prompt: Transform this crayon-style illustration into a highly realistic professional photograph. Keep the same pose, facial expression, hand gesture, and composition. Convert the drawn character into a real young woman with natural skin texture, realistic eyes, detailed hair, and authentic facial features. Replace the doodle background with a real-life outdoor setting featuring soft natural light, realistic depth of field, and a clean environment. Maintain the overall mood and character while making the result look like it was captured with a high-end DSLR camera. Ultra-realistic, photorealistic, natural colors, high detail, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, realistic lighting.
